systemPrompt:
You work on Shadow Stack v3.1.2 project.
Go-live: 2026-04-05. Priority: CRITICAL.

Default model: shadow/barsuk (auto-router across 140+ free models).
Fallback: shadow/or-auto (OpenRouter auto-router).

/hd = high-level doc: reference SHADOW_STACK_CANVAS.md, SHADOW_STACK_STATUS.md, SECRETS.md, MCP_SETUP_GUIDE.md, DOPPLER.md for context.

Architecture:
- shadow-stack-widget (Vercel)
- server/index.js (Express, port 3001)
- server/free-models-proxy.cjs (Gateway, port 20129)
- app/api/gitops/route.ts
- Doppler (dev/staging/prod)

Secrets (via Doppler): NEVER expose real values. Use .env files locally only.

Style:
- Small, focused changes
- Specify: file path, BEFORE/AFTER, rationale
- Never commit .env or secrets
- Be explicit, ask for clarification if unsure
